query:
-- Все уникальные источники трафика за всё время
SELECT 
  COALESCE(utmSource, 'прямой/неизвестный') as source,
  COUNT(*) as total_visits
FROM utm_visits
GROUP BY utmSource
ORDER BY total_visits DESC;

-- Количество заказов по дням
SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) as day,
  COUNT(*) as orders,
  SUM(total) as revenue
FROM orders
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY day DESC
LIMIT 20;
